results.title: Street Fighter 6 Does What Tekken Won't - Add Final Fantasy 7's Tifa
results.description: The rumours were true. The rumours were 100% true: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation’s Tifa will be joining Street Fighter 6 as a playable character in Year 4. The iconic bartender will be joined by two brand-new characters: Yasmine and Arjun. Read the full article on pushsquare.com

results.title: BitFlow Claxon Frame Grabbers Accelerate AI-Driven Machine Vision Systems with NVIDIA GPU Performance
results.description: Full CoaXPress 2.0 Throughput and Direct GPU Integration Put Real-Time AI Inference Within Reach of Vision Engineers

results.title: Yango Group Hosts Innovation Day 2026 in Abidjan
results.description: –More than 200 business leaders, entrepreneurs, policymakers, and technology experts gathered in Abidjan on 4 June for Yango Innovation Day 2026, where Yango Group, a UAE-based technology company, showcased technologies used across its global markets, discussed the future of urban digital services in Africa, announced new local partnerships and recognised graduates of its Fellowship Programme [...]
